expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子的板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度] 是总尺寸，[板厚] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[背板厚度] 是背板材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan Papan Latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height],[Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นสำหรับตู้. [Width], [Height],[Depth] เป็นขนาดรวม, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นส่วนบน, ล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นหลัง. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height],[Depth] là số đo tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của Ván Trên, Dưới và Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày của Ván Mặt Sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ay kabuuang sukat, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Itaas, Ibaba, at Gilid na Tabla, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Tabla sa Likod. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အကန့်များအတွက် သတ်မှတ်ချက် အရွယ်အစားများတွက်ချက်ထားသည်။ [Width], [Height],[Depth] သည် စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချက်ဖြစ်ပြီး [BoardThick] သည် အပေါ်ပိုင်း၊ အောက်ပိုင်းနှင့်ခြမ်းဖက်ပိုင်းဆိုင်ရာ ပစ္စည်းထူရီ။ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ပိုင်းဘုတ်အထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាទំហំក្តារសម្រាប់ទូផ្ទះបាយ។ [Width], [Height],[Depth] គឺជាវិមាត្រសរុប ខណៈដែល [BoardThick] គ្រឿងចក្រ គឺជាកម្រាស់នៃសំឡីលើ ក្រោម និងជញ្ជាំង [BackBoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់បញ្ចាស់។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຊອກສັ່ງສະບັບສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ແມ່ນຂະໜາດທັ້ງหมด [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຫນາຂອງແຜງຂ້າງ, [BackBoardThick] ຄວາມຫນາຂອງແຜງຫຼັງ.(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板のサイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth]は総寸法、[BoardThick]は上部、下部、および側面の板材の厚さ、[BackBoardThick]は背面板の板材の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 판 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height],[Depth]은 총 치수이며, [BoardThick]는 상판, 하판 및 측면 판재의 두께, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 판재의 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de los tablones de un gabinete. [Width], [Height],[Depth] son las medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero de fondo. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour une armoire. [Width], [Height],[Depth] correspondent à la dimension totale, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieure, inférieure et latérales, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche de fond. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height],[Depth] sind Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platte, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height],[Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height],[Depth] — это общие размеры, [BoardThick] — это толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковых досок, [BackBoardThick] — это толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
